title: Bridges over navigable waters
doc_html:
§24.  Bridges over navigable waters

The department may, by itself or in conjunction with the United States or with other states or any agency thereof, construct bridges over navigable waters in this state.
doc_text:
§24.  Bridges over navigable waters
The department may, by itself or in conjunction with the United States or with other states or any agency thereof, construct bridges over navigable waters in this state.
